artifact: Returns cards with both foil and regular Card Kingdom identifiers present.
sql:
SELECT c.name
FROM cards AS c
WHERE c.cardkingdomfoilid IS NOT NULL
  AND c.cardkingdomid IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.name;

raw_response.sql:

FROM cards AS c
WHERE c.cardkingdomfoilid IS NOT NULL
  AND c.cardkingdomid IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.name;
